basic_details.short_information: Wildlife Institute of India (WII) has published the Consultant - C Notification 2026 on 12 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Consultant - C position. Candidates within the age range of Max: 45 years and holding a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences, Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology, or a Doctoral Degree in Science/Engineering & Technology are eligible to apply online at wii.gov.in. The application process will be active from 12 May 2026 to 26 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: up to 5 years OBC: up to 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or equivalent, OR Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology with relevant experience, OR Doctoral Degree in Science/Engineering & Technology.
qualification.details: Consultant - C: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Marine Sciences / Marine Biology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences)/ Agricultural Sciences from a recognized institute/ University AND 5-10 years' experience (after obtaining Master's Degree) in Research/Development/Design/Academic/ Government Institutions/Organizations in environment/ forestry or equivalent. OR Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/ Technology (Computer Science/Information Technology/ Remote Sensing/ GIS/ Data/Electrical Engineering/electronics & communication/AI Technology/Data Science) from a recognized institute/ University AND 5-10 years' experience (after obtaining Bachelor's Degree) in Research/Development/Design /Academic/ Government Institutions/Organizations in environment/ forestry or equivalent. OR Doctoral Degree in Science/ Engineering & Technology from a recognized institute/ University.

salary_details.details: Consolidated emoluments of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month.

selection_process: and publications. Shortlisting of top ten (10) candidates for interview. Online interview conducted by a duly constituted Selection Committee.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WII Consultant - C Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WII to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WII Consultant - C recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the WII Consultant - C position is 26 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant - C post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences or equivalent, OR a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology with relevant experience, OR a Doctoral Degree in Science/Engineering & Technology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Consultant - C position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant - C post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for the WII Consultant - C recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for the General Category. For SC/ST/OBC/EWS and Physically Challenged (PC) candidates, the fee is Rs. 100/- as an Application Processing Fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant - C post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive consolidated emoluments of Rs. 1,00,000/- per month for the Consultant - C position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the WII Consultant - C recruitment must be submitted online through the official application portal. No offline applications will be considered.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant - C post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant - C position at the Wildlife Institute of India.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Consultant - C role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening based on qualifications and experience, followed by shortlisting of candidates for an online interview conducted by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Wildlife Institute of India located?
faq.answer: The Wildlife Institute of India is located in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 248002.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any experience required for the Consultant - C position?
faq.answer: Yes, 5-10 years of relevant experience is required after obtaining the Master's or Bachelor's Degree, depending on the qualification, in research, development, design, academic, or government institutions related to environment or forestry.
